findings.title: npm vulnerability: @next/eslint-plugin-next
findings.description: glob. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: ajv
findings.description: ajv has ReDoS when using `$data` option. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: brace-expansion
findings.description: brace-expansion Regular Expression Denial of Service vulnerability. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: dompurify
findings.description: DOMPurify contains a Cross-site Scripting vulnerability. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: flatted
findings.description: flatted vulnerable to unbounded recursion DoS in parse() revive phase. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: glob
findings.description: glob CLI: Command injection via -c/--cmd executes matches with shell:true. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: js-yaml
findings.description: js-yaml has prototype pollution in merge (<<). Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: jspdf
findings.description: jsPDF Denial of Service (DoS). Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: lodash
findings.description: Lodash has Prototype Pollution Vulnerability in `_.unset` and `_.omit` functions. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: mdast-util-to-hast
findings.description: mdast-util-to-hast has unsanitized class attribute. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: minimatch
findings.description: minimatch has a ReDoS via repeated wildcards with non-matching literal in pattern. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: next
findings.description: Information exposure in Next.js dev server due to lack of origin verification. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: nodemailer
findings.description: Nodemailer: Email to an unintended domain can occur due to Interpretation Conflict. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: picomatch
findings.description: Picomatch: Method Injection in POSIX Character Classes causes incorrect Glob Matching. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: yaml
findings.description: yaml is vulnerable to Stack Overflow via deeply nested YAML collections. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.
